parameters.text:
=Analyze the following news articles about a company:

Company: {{ $('loopOverItems').item.json["Company Name"] }}
Title: {{ $json.data }} [\nTitle]
Description: {{ $json.data }} [\nDescription]
Date: {{ $json.data }} [\nDate]

Based ONLY on the text above, generate a raw JSON object (NO markdown, NO backticks, NO explanations) with the following exact keys and structure:

{
  "shortSummary": "A concise 2-sentence summary of the news.",
  "detailedSummary": "A comprehensive overview of the event, implications, and context.",
  "revenue": "The anual company porfits (if not provided use your internal knowledge)"
  "pubDate": "The publication date {{ $json.data.match('\nDate') }}."
}

Constraint Checklist:
1. Output MUST be valid JSON.
2. Do NOT include ```json or ``` markers.
3. Do NOT include any text outside the JSON object.
4. Keys must be exactly as listed above (camelCase).
